subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Him Who brought forth the First Creation through resplendent signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن انشا النشئه الاولی باثار باهره ... فی الحقیقه نفوس خاضعه خاشعه تاثیر
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @creation of the world, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
